rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Educ. Code §10.003, which governs lead agency duties for an early childhood data system. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 10.003. LEAD AGENCY DUTIES. The lead agency shall:
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict exists.
